title: Periodate as an Analytical Reagent. Part I.
author: R. L. Kaushik
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Metaperiodato has been used for the estimation of sodium sulphide, sodium sulphite, sodium bisulphite, sodium dithionite and sodium thiosulphate present alone or in a mixture of two or more of the compounds.
steps_raw: Metaperiodato has been used for the estimation of sodium sulphide, sodium sulphite, sodium bisulphite, sodium dithionite and sodium thiosulphate present alone or in a mixture of two or more of the compounds.
